---
applyTo: "**"
---

# Commit Message Rules

- Use conventional commits format: `<type>(<optional scope>): <short description>`
- Types: `feat`, `fix`, `test`, `chore`, `docs`, `refactor`, `style`, `ci`
- Subject line maximum 72 characters, written in imperative mood ("add" not "added")
- Scope examples for this project: `pages`, `fixtures`, `tests`, `helpers`, `features`, `config`
- Never include JIRA ticket keys or issue numbers in commit messages, PR titles, or descriptions
- Add a short body (2–4 bullet points) for non-trivial changes, separated from the subject by a blank line
